title: Snow Day!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I woke up—*pop!*—like toast!
My feet went *boing-boing-boing!*
I yanked the curtains—*swish!*
"Snow Day!" I *shrieked* with joy!

[chorus]
Snow day! Snow day!
I jump and I shout!
Snow day! Snow day!
No school—*wahoo!*

[verse 2]
I’ll pack a snow wall—*whump!*
I’ll toss a snowball—*splat!*
I’ll spin like a top—*whoa!*
Till I fall—*crash!*—just like that!

[chorus]
Snow day! Snow day!
I jump and I shout!
Snow day! Snow day!
No school—*wahoo!*

[ending]
My cheeks are pink,
My mittens are wet.
More snow in my dreams…
Goodnight—sleep tight!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, ukulele, bass, and cajón, 119 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The pale pink alarm clock reads 6:17 AM when you bolt upright in bed, heart pounding—then you fling open the blue curtains to a world hushed and glowing white, your bare feet already dancing on the cold hardwood as you scream "SNOW DAY!" into the hallway.
cover_description: A kid in pajamas flings open blue curtains to a glowing white world.
